programme.title: Idea Generation
programme.desc: Innovative individuals in creative entrepreneurship discuss how great ideas come to life, explaining how they execute and operationalize big ideas.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers -- leaders of some of America's biggest companies -- in this interview show that aims to answer the question of what makes a great leader. Rubenstein uses his chats to explore successful leadership skills through the personal and professional choices made by the business world's most influential people. Rubenstein travels across the country to find out about the business leaders' stories and uncover information about their paths to success. The interview subjects include Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, Berkshire Hathaway chairman Warren Buffett, and Pepsi CEO Indra Nooyi.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This Asian-focused version is hosted by Shery Ahn, David Ingles, Haidi Lun, Rishaad Salamat and Angie Lau. They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.sub-title: Weathering the Storm: Surviving Hurricane Ian
programme.desc: Hurricane Ian unleashed catastrophic destruction across Southwest Florida, washing entire neighborhoods to sea. As loved ones are separated and communities face unimaginable loss, extraordinary acts of courage emerge in the storm’s aftermath.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.sub-title: Eat Play Stay: Sunshine & Sand in Seaside, FL
programme.desc: All-American hot dogs, a selfie museum, and ‘The Truman Show’ filming locations.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.sub-title: Free Spirit: How Kansas City Gives Classic Cocktails a Spirited Twist
programme.desc: Master bartender Kate Gerwin visits Kansas City to talk whiskey, taste the nonalcoholic future at an innovative new bar, experience jazz at the Mutual Musicians Foundation, and learn all about Prohibition in the city that ignored it best.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.sub-title: Chaos & Kindness: French Toast for Free on the Kindness Tour
programme.desc: The crew’s 30-day kindness blitz brings joy to packed crowds and local communities, serving up French toast, tipping drive-thru heroes, mowing a random lawn and capping it off with a solo show on a dedicated fan's doorstep.

programme.title: One Pill Can Kill
programme.desc: Told through the voices of grieving parents, this documentary follows the real and lasting impact of the fentanyl crisis. Capturing the aftermath of sudden loss, the search for answers, and the transformation of grief into public advocacy.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Hometown Tragedy: A Single Father's Life-Saving Last Act
programme.desc: Single father Kendal Fenwick is the 295th homicide in Baltimore in 2015. Family and investigators wonder whether his efforts to curb drugs and violence in his neighborhood made him a target. Or is it something else entirely?

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.sub-title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: You can run. You can hide. But chances are, they’re still gonna find you. These are some of the wildest and most bizarre police captures on record.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.sub-title: Maker Nation Challenge: Glass Artists Blow Away Judges with Fire and Finesse
programme.desc: Three of Orlando’s finest glass artists take on the challenge of creating an original design celebrating "The City Beautiful," but will a bird-brained twist push them to their melting point, and who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Maker Nation
programme.desc: A Pittsburgh blacksmith, and an acrylic pour-artist in Boston.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.sub-title: Finding Adventure: Miranda's Daring Dive for Growth
programme.desc: Miranda, a 24-year-old mechanical engineer was diagnosed with MS. Determined not to let MS dim her zest for life, Miranda and Kinga set out to find the outdoor fun in and around Cincinnati.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.sub-title: Ed and Day in the ‘Burgh: Kickin' Butt in Larimer
programme.desc: Ed and Day kick butt, ride dirty, and make artisanal cocktails at Goodlander Cocktail Brewery in the town of Larimer.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.sub-title: Chaos & Kindness: A Concert for Kindness and Bikes for Everyone
programme.desc: Justin and Ryan team up with Elliot, a friend who helped Recycle Percussion get their start years ago. Together they pull off an epic hometown concert where every kid receives a bike and Elliot reveals a final act of kindness he has up his sleeve.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Blind Kitchen: Re-creating Indian Butter Sauce Grooper vs. Woodfired Octopus
programme.desc: In this battle, it's a culinary inferno, as Chef Bruno Zacchini of Pizza Bruno in College Park & Curry Ford West takes on Chef Amanda Czekaj of Farm & Haus in Audubon Park. There's no escaping the heat on this episode of Blind Kitchen.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: A Missouri community seeks answers when two young women disappear a decade apart

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.sub-title: Free Spirit : How Art and Mixology Meet Up in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Kate explores gin and rituals with a master distiller, talks art and cocktails with an Indigenous painter, and gets a lesson in moving mixology on George R.R. Martin’s adventure train in the high-desert city of Santa Fe.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Hometown Tragedy: Dark Family Secrets Unearthed in the Bible Belt
programme.desc: Growing up, two siblings hear unsettling stories about their family's history. They don't know what to believe about the ones who went missing in 1992, until, decades later, the haunting truth comes out.

programme.title: In Transit by Esquire
programme.desc: Esquire’s Dave Holmes chats with Pitch Perfect’s Skylar Astin about New Orleans.

programme.title: Completed Episodes
programme.sub-title: My Perfect Day with Woman's Day: Caring Crusader Enjoys Paw-tastic Surprises at Every Turn
programme.desc: Scott's life revolves around everyone's favorite four-legged friends, from rescuing and caring for countless dogs, his spirit is unwavering. Today Meaghan gives back a day full of moments for him and his beloved canine companion.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.sub-title: Finding Adventure: Brains and Beauty Getting Dirty
programme.desc: Dr. Treva Brown holds a PhD in Chemistry, works for the US Naval Research Laboratory and is a pageant queen. This workaholic PhDiva can’t make time for herself! Kinga wants to take Treva off the runway and into the outdoors.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.sub-title: Plate It! Baltimore: Who Will Win the Battle of the Bay?
programme.desc: Chefs Sean Guy and Amy Hessel compete in this seafood showdown, the ultimate Battle of the Bay. Who will walk away with the title Captain of the Chesapeake?

programme.title: Lost Innocence: The Tragedy of Harmony Montgomery
programme.desc: A police investigation into a missing seven-year-old girl in Manchester, New Hampshire reveals harrowing details that shock the state. But even more disturbing is the discovery that the tragic outcome could have been avoided.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.sub-title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: Havoc-Wreaking Hackers
programme.desc: Cyber-burglars, a dangerous mix of con artist and geek, wreak havoc on the technologically vulnerable. Our experts offer tips to spot such high-tech trickery before it's too late.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.sub-title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: Brazen Heists You Won't Believe
programme.desc: Heists that are so bold, brazen and audacious you have to see them to believe them. But in the world of crime, audacity doesn’t always pay.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Hometown Tragedy: The Football Star Shooting
programme.desc: A beloved University of Kentucky football player is murdered on the porch of his house during his 21st birthday party in an assassination-style killing. What leads to the shooter's capture is equally shocking.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.sub-title: Chaos & Kindness : Fulfilling Prom Dreams and Crowning a King and Queen
programme.desc: Ryan and Justin make dreams come true when they throw a second chance prom for the community. Ryan surprises a longtime friend with a promposal, and makes Jimmy Luv a King.

programme.title: Local Love
programme.sub-title: Local Love: Green-Thumb Heart Looking For Rooted Romance
programme.desc: Successful business owner Hunter, dates three eligible bachelors from Des Moines. From T-shirt making to plant crafting to sparks igniting under the stars, who will get a second date?

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Can Chef Peter Kusiw of La Provence trip up Chef Nathanial Zimet of Boucherie with his secret sauce? Maybe yes, maybe no, but either way the mystery guest judge will make you question what you see.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.sub-title: Chaos & Kindness: A Day of Fun for Young Heart Transplant Patient in Boston
programme.desc: Justin and Ryan surprise a little boy awaiting a heart transplant with a fun-filled afternoon at Boston Chidlren's Hospital. From video games and candy, to a hot sauce challenge, the team will put a smile on everyone's face.

programme.title: Lost Innocence: The Tragedy of Harmony Montgomery
programme.desc: A police investigation into a missing seven-year-old girl in Manchester, New Hampshire reveals harrowing details that shock the state. But even more disturbing is the discovery that the tragic outcome could have been avoided.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.sub-title: Finding Adventure: Double Amputee’s Inspiring Ride
programme.desc: Three years after his double amputation, Jeff in Albuquerque is ready to reconnect with nature. Kinga is there to root him on as he takes on challenging and inspiring outdoor adventures.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.sub-title: Eat Play Stay: Magical Elixirs & Beautiful Pictures in Alexandria, VA
programme.desc: Dare to try a chicken sandwich so spicy even the chef won't eat it. Cool off with a sweet treat at a historic corner ice cream shop. Enjoy monumental views from the Potomac River, and create your own Harry Potter potion.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot
programme.sub-title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot: Ginger Minj, Skater Girl, & Hard Rockers Reveal Best Hangouts
programme.desc: From burlesque to roller skating to a Titanic museum, our local Orlando experts won’t lead you astray. We’ve got rock stars and drag queens who are passionate about ‘The City Beautiful’ and know exactly which spots are worth your time.

programme.title: LIVE: WGAL News 8
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and traffic from the WGAL News 8 team.

programme.title: Always Remember Your Name
programme.desc: A documentary of mistaken identity, hope, love, and the power of story by two Holocaust survivors.

programme.title: 'Behind the Lens: A Storytellers Project'
programme.desc: Join WGAL News 8's Anne Shannon for "Behind the Lens: A Storytellers Project," where we relive the best of 2024 through the eyes of our award-winning photojournalists.

programme.title: Sports Town Stories
programme.sub-title: Sports Town Stories: Omaha Athletes Seize Opportunity
programme.desc: From a popular new pro volleyball team drawing huge crowds, to a former football pro who now coaches e-sports, these Nebraskan athletes show how to seize the moment.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Blind Kitchen: The Marriage of Flavors
programme.desc: Big City Chef Hish Hassan from Chickadees in Boston takes on Small town Chef J. Huntington Chase of The Rabbit Hole in Worthington in an explosion of flavors and techniques. Who will prevail in this Urban vs Rural showdown?

programme.title: Completed Episodes
programme.sub-title: America's Most Delish Midwest: 10 Old School Classics From The Midwest that Stood the Test of Time
programme.desc: Indulge in the old-school classics that have reigned in the Midwest for decades. From Wisconsin cheese curds to Kansas City's burnt ends, enjoy these unique comfort foods that are as timeless as they are tasty.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.sub-title: Weathering the Storm: Surviving Hurricane Ian
programme.desc: Hurricane Ian unleashed catastrophic destruction across Southwest Florida, washing entire neighborhoods to sea. As loved ones are separated and communities face unimaginable loss, extraordinary acts of courage emerge in the storm’s aftermath.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Hometown Tragedy: Escaping the House of Demons
programme.desc: A teenager survives the unspeakable in her Elk Grove, California, home. When her younger sister goes missing, investigators question her about what she witnessed and uncover a tragedy that will shape her path from trauma to truth.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.sub-title: Eat Play Stay: O Little Town of Bethlehem, PA
programme.desc: Browse a haunted bookshop, indulge in veggie-licious vegan treats and tour the town with your very own wise man in the land of continuous Christmas.

programme.title: LIVE: WGAL News 8
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WGAL News 8 team.

programme.title: Maker Nation
programme.desc: Maker Nation

programme.title: Grit of Greenwood
programme.desc: Greenwood was a thriving Black district in Tulsa when, 100 years ago, it was destroyed in less than 24 hours.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: Crimes, Cons & Capers explores some of the wildest headline-grabbing crimes and far-fetched escapades from across the country including bizarre love scams, high-speed car chases, risky prison breaks and more.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.sub-title: Weathering the Storm: Couple Faces Historic Tornado on Eve of Wedding
programme.desc: On December 10, 2021, a violent tornado outbreak hit western Kentucky. It was the deadliest weather event in the history of the Commonwealth. But as families faced a bleak holiday season, hope emerged in surprising ways.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.desc: Makers, crafters and artists square off to create the most iconic art piece that best represents their city. From glass-blowers and chalk artists to metalsmiths and tattooers, see who Host Ashley Adams and the judges will crown the victor.

programme.title: LIVE: WGAL News 8
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WGAL News 8 team.

programme.title: WGAL News 8 Chronicle 75 Years of Service
programme.desc: For 75 years, WGAL has been part of the Susquehanna Valley. We're going to look back at some of the biggest stories, examine how the community has grown and changed, and look ahead to what's next.

programme.title: Ethan: The Miracle Dog
programme.desc: Follow one dog's journey to recovery, a forever home and eventually, stardom.

programme.desc: A Brown Bess musket comes into the shop; Thomas Jefferson's private copy of Jay's Treaty; a smashed guitar from KISS front man Paul Stanley comes by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A rare 1936 Zippo lighter prototype; an antique rotary telephone; Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick auctions off some of the shop's coolest finds; Corey and Chum check out an Ultra 4 Racecar; Rick sees one of the biggest collections of Mickey Mouse memorabilia in the world.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An astrological armillary sphere; a British candy dispenser; a signed Louis Armstrong photograph and handkerchief; a vintage Ghirardelli billboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A model train once owned by Johnny Cash comes into the shop; a 1920's chicken incubator; Rick checks out a 17th century Tibetan Buddha.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A signed, limited-edition copy of "Seven Years in Tibet" enters the shop; Corey and Chumlee yuk it up over a Three Stooges promotional projector; Chumlee seeks new policies to liven up the beginning of the work week.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A collection of items signed by President Franklin Delano Roosevelt comes into the shop; a valuable photograph of Babe Ruth from his rookie season; Chumlee tries to get money back that he lends to Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A hand-painted, signed guitar from Def Leppard's Phil Collen comes into the shop; a pair of sneakers signed by NBA legend LeBron James; Rick checks out a 19th century carriage clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An autographed book written by master illusionist Harry Houdini arrives in the shop; Corey and Chumlee scope out a vintage x-ray unit; Chumlee takes a vow of silence.

programme.desc: A Roman shield movie prop from Cleopatra comes into the shop; a 1922 silver peace dollar rolls in; the guys discuss their generations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The guys check out a Shuffle Alley bowling machine; Rick and Corey are offered an official movie prop from "The Godfather;" the Old Man discovers the perfect way to shut Chumlee down.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.sub-title: Atlanta Homicide - Ghosts of the Past
programme.desc: Quinn and Velazquez are called when Jerry Heard is found dead from gunshot wounds. They learn Heard spends his nights at a local bar, and the night he was killed, he made passes at two different women, one with an armed boyfriend. With at least three potential suspects, the detectives get to work.

programme.title: Atlanta Homicide
programme.desc: Neighborhood character Willie Bell is found naked and dead early in the morning. With nothing else to go on, Quinn and Velazquez discover that Willie was seen with two different women the night before he was found. With two prime suspects, they try to find the truth.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: After young parents-to-be are gunned down in Memphis, police are shocked to learn their deaths resulted from a vengeful dispute over bundles of hair. While certain they have their killer, the road to justice proves trickier than first thought.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.desc: Long standing racial tensions in Brooklyn�s Bensonhurst neighborhood explode into months of protests after an unarmed Black teenager named Yusuf Hawkins is pursued, shot, and killed by a mob determined to send a message to Black communities throughout New York.

programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Caught in the Web

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a kindhearted janitor is beaten to death in his home, it doesn’t take long to learn he was embroiled in a love triangle with his wife and a close friend. Was this just a random attack, or is there something far more sinister behind the murder?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - A Love That Won't Let Go
programme.desc: A Houston woman with a heart of gold is found shot to death, and police consider a love triangle may have taken a fatal turn. Detectives delve into her love life, they uncover a possessive suspect who decided if he couldn't have her, no one would.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Chained by Love

programme.sub-title: For My Man - Bloodshed and Betrayal

programme.desc: 34-year-old Freddie Farah is gunned down in his Florida grocery store.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The case of a gruesome stabbing death of a bullied teenager remains unsolved for 27 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace. A decade later, the cold case heats up.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a suspected serial killer preyed on women in small towns located on the banks of the Mississippi River until the murders abruptly ceased and went unsolved.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The body of Lori Nesson is found in a ditch in 1974, yet her death is not ruled a homicide. After four decades, the cause of death is changed to homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A fire in January 2007 claims the life of WWII vet Bennie Angelo. A closer look at the crime scene reveals Bennie was dead before the fire, bumping an arson case up to homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.desc: After the gruesome murder of an aspiring actor in Georgia, police quickly run out of leads; a new digital forensic tool breathes life into the investigation, allowing authorities to identify the killer with pinpoint precision.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: With digital forensics, authorities are able to debunk the alibi of one of the last people to see a 24-year-old missing jogger in rural Arkansas, making him the primary suspect in her murder; first-time interviews with the victim's family.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: The family of a missing Texas mother becomes concerned when they start receiving suspicious text messages from her phone; unsolved for years, a trail of digital clues ultimately helps investigators build a compelling case against her murderer.

programme.desc: A brutal attack on two employees of a high-end shop leaves one woman dead and another scarred by the memory of the events she survived; as detectives make sense of the horrific tale, bizarre clues bring them to a shocking truth.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: A bounty hunter escorts a killer to prison but allows his outlaw brother to catch up with them to have a showdown over a previous shocking murder.

programme.title: The Wild Westerners
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal (James Philbrook) and his wife (Nancy Kovack) bring Union gold east through outlaws and Indians.

programme.title: The Stranger Wore a Gun
programme.desc: After the Civil War, a spy for the Confederacy absconds to Arizona to start a new life but gets reluctantly pulled into a stagecoach gold robbery.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: The Prescott Kid
programme.desc: A cowboy finds himself in serious trouble with a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: The Thrill Hunter
programme.desc: After lying about being a stuntman, a blowhard (Buck Jones) gets the chance to prove himself to a movie studio.

programme.title: Two Rode Together
programme.desc: For a fee, hard-drinking Texas marshal Guthrie McCabe (James Stewart) agrees to help Army officer Jim Gary (Richard Widmark) search for a group of whites who were abducted years earlier by Comanche warriors. After rescuing two of the abductees, McCabe and Gary find that the former captives have fully adopted the culture of their American Indian captors and are barely recognizable. Cultures collide as they attempt to return the settlers to their original -- and now long-forgotten -- lives.

programme.title: Streets of Ghost Town
programme.desc: The Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) and his sidekick (Smiley Burnette) look for stolen gold with a history.

programme.title: The Black Dakotas
programme.desc: A Confederate plot to turn the Sioux against the Union crumbles when a double agent makes off with a shipment of gold.

programme.title: Prairie Schooners
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok (Bill Elliott) and his pal (Dub Taylor) take a wagon train through Indian country.

programme.title: Reprisal!
programme.desc: Frank Madden (Guy Madison), who is part Native American but passes as white, purchases a ranch in the small town of Kendall, Okla. When Frank moves in, he finds that the bigoted townspeople have recently let three brothers, who are also his neighbors, get away with the lynching murder of innocent Native Americans. As tensions between the townspeople and local Native Americans rise, Hank becomes torn between fighting against injustice and keeping his true identity a secret.

programme.title: The Quick Gun
programme.desc: A banished gunfighter (Audie Murphy) returns to his sweetheart (Merry Anders) and helps his sheriff friend (James Best) face outlaws.

programme.title: Riding Wild
programme.desc: A ranch foreman tries to thwart a crook's attempts to run his employers off their land.

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. After narrowly surviving an attack from Scavo and his men, Stewart has little choice but to fight back in order to save both his ranch and his family, including nephew Howie (Skip Homeier).

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: Hannah Brockway (Evelyn Keyes) has a perfect fiancé in Dr. Sam Martin (Willard Parker). Sam, who is respected by Hannah's family, is a noble man who cares for her and can make a good living in their frontier town. Yet Hannah craves adventure and finds it when she meets dashing Ben Dembrow (Larry Parks), the youngest of a notorious crime family. Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: Comanche Station
programme.desc: When solitary cowboy Jefferson Cody (Randolph Scott) hears tales of a white woman living as a captive of the Comanche tribe, he rides deep into the tribe's territory to exchange goods for her freedom. As Cody escorts the captive woman away, he learns that she is Nancy Lowe (Nancy Gates), and that there is a sizable reward offered by her husband for her return. Cody and Mrs. Lowe must brave ruthless bounty hunters greedy for the reward, as well as the now-warring Comanches, to make it to safety.

programme.title: The Texican
programme.desc: Deputy Jess Carlin (Audie Murphy) leaves his Texas hometown in disgrace, framed by corrupt saloon owner Luke Starr (Broderick Crawford) for a crime he didn't commit. When his brother, muckraking newspaper editor Roy Carlin (Víctor Vilanova), is murdered after printing an exposé of Starr's crooked deals, Carlin returns home from the Mexican border town where he's been holed up and enlists his brother's fiancée (Luz Márquez) and saloon dancer Kit O'Neal (Diana Lorys) to bring Starr down.

programme.title: The New Daughters of Joshua Cabe
programme.desc: While posing as his daughters, three women discover an elderly homesteader has been falsely imprisoned for murder and hatch a plot to smuggle him out.

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: Former Union soldier John Parrish (Glenn Ford) wants to sell his ranch and start a new life by settling down out east. However, the ruthless tactics of Lew Wilkison (Edward G. Robinson), the scheming businessman interested in his property, make Parrish reconsider the move, especially after one of his ranch hands is murdered. Adding to the increasingly tense conflict is Wilkison's wife, Martha (Barbara Stanwyck), who is cheating on her husband with his brother, Cole (Brian Keith).

programme.title: Return of the Durango Kid
programme.desc: A stagecoach passenger poses as a masked avenger to track down the thieves who robbed him and his companions.

programme.title: Stranger From Arizona
programme.desc: A quiet cowboy (Buck Jones) on a white horse saves a gal (Dorothy Fay) from cattle rustlers.

programme.desc: When Tracy Harris is abducted and held for ransom, her father Keith has only 48 hours to deliver $500,000. Forced back into the criminal world he tried to escape; Keith faces dangerous alliances and hidden truths in order to save his daughter.

programme.desc: Former police captain Thomas Cooper, once a respected figure, finds himself entangled in a dangerous deal with a notorious crime boss. programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Through X with Brennan Oneill

programme.title: University of Texas Documentary
programme.desc: 3 years ago, pro lacrosse player Kyle Hartzell stepped on the campus of University of Texas at Austin as their new club lacrosse team head coach. Now they are a top MCLA program competing for championships. TLN went to Austin, TX during the most anticipated game of the Longhorn's season to uncover what makes their program so special.

programme.title: Going West
programme.desc: University of Utah turns club lacrosse into NCAA lacrosse team

programme.title: TLN Facility Tours
programme.sub-title: TLN Facility Tours - TLN Facility Tours
programme.desc: Johns Hopkins & Clemson: Explore two top-tier lacrosse programs as TLN takes you inside their world-class facilities. Visit Johns Hopkins in Baltimore, MD, home to the legendary Blue Jays, and tour the iconic Cordish Lacrosse Center and Homewood Field. Then, head to Clemson, SC, for an exclusive look at the nation's premier women's lacrosse facilities.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Joey Spallina - Paul Carcaterra visits Syracuse, N.Y. to pull back the curtain on the biggest name in College Lacrosse: Joey Spallina. In this episode of THROUGH X, Spallina speaks on wearing the No. 22 at Syracuse, shares his goal to return the Orange to NCAA Championship glory, and shows you how to score his signature behind-the-back goal.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra heads to Evanston, IL to visit with Northwestern's Izzy Scane. Izzy has been a dominant force for the Wildcats since she first arrived on campus. With a National title, the Tewaaraton Award winner, and record shattering season – she has cemented herself as an all-time great. We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 15 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. In this episode, Mitch and the crew break down Joey Spallina's pro debut in Baltimore, then welcome Tewaaraton Award winner Shawn Lyght for an exclusive interview. After that, they explain the proposed NCAA "5-in-5" eligibility rule and how it could change the landscape in college lacrosse.

programme.title: Connor Shellenberger | 2025 Season Highlights
programme.desc: The New York Atlas attackman had a historic sophomore season including the Jim Brown MVP Award and a Championship.

programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

programme.title: The BEST Moments From Street Lacrosse in Atlanta
programme.desc: We compiled the best moments from our Atlanta Street Lacrosse livestream. Check out these highlights from the HBCU game, MCLA game, Atlanta All-Stars, and PLL/WLL pros — as well as interviews with EarthGang and others!

programme.title: Brennan O'Neill | 2025 Season Highlights
programme.desc: See the best of Brennan O'Neil in his highlights from the 2025 season.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "Tajikistan, a Mountainous Land"
programme.desc: With the fall of the Soviet Union, wildlife populations in Tajikistan were devastated, bringing some of their unique mountain species to the brink of extinction. With the help of funds generated through hunting, vast areas are now being conserved and protected. Dan Cabela explores this conservation success.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor rise early for a full day of adventure in the Keys, rocking the sunrise for baby tarpon, scoring on some mid-day permit, and watching the sun go down in search for big tarpon.

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Offshore Permit With Captain Brandon"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Brandon Vargas, who leads them off the shore Duck Key to an exciting batch of offshore permit.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Offshore Amberjack And Mutton With Captain Brandon"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Brandon Vargas, as they continue from an earlier flurry of offshore permit catches to a variety of fun offshore targets.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Baby Tarpon And Snook In The Glades"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head to the Everglades for whatever may come, and that turns out to be some exciting action near the mangroves with snook and baby tarpon.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor act on some good reports on Juvenile Goliath Grouper activity in the Everglades and end up with an exciting and adventurous day of fishing.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Rich’s son Reed who acts as an enthusiastic guide to some spectacular spearfishing in the upper Florida Keys.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors - "Starbrite Double Feature 2 (The Collective)"
programme.desc: Capt. Blair takes head of Starbrite, Greor Dornau out of Cape Canaveral for a day of fishing and ends the show fishing with Dr. Todd Osborne of the Indian River Clam restoration project all during the Starbrite Seasafe Collective weekend in an effort to support the project.

programme.title: We Caught That
programme.sub-title: We Caught That - "Redfish On The Half Shell"
programme.desc: In this episode, Jason Dozier teams up with his longtime friend, Capt. Danny, for an exciting fishing adventure in Tampa Bay. Reuniting on the water for the first time in over a decade, they're looking forward to making memories, enjoying the day, and maybe even reeling in a fresh catch for dinner.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: When the yellowtail at the islands refuse to play, it’s time to switch up the game plan. Ali and Rush pivot north of San Diego in search of hard-charging bluefin tuna during a multi-day mission aboard the 43’ custom ACI Catamaran "Killer Bee". Armed with the right crew, the right gear, and a never-quit mindset, the guys roll the dice on an overnight move—hoping to wake up to redemption and put a few quality bluefin on deck.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Returning to Venice, Louisiana for the first time in nearly a decade, Rush reconnects with longtime friends Eric and Monique Newman of Journey South Outfitters for an unforgettable inshore fishing adventure in the heart of the Mississippi River Delta. With reports of massive schools of redfish cruising the beaches, Monique (“Moe”) must decide whether to trust the intel and make a bold run down the coast—or rely on her own instincts built from years on the water. The mission is simple: put Rush on a true bull redfish and see if he has what it takes to earn a spot in her coveted “Over 40-Inch Club.” This trip highlights why Venice, Louisiana is considered one of the premier inshore fisheries in the country—and why having the right guide makes all the difference. Target Species: Bull Redfish. Location: Venice, Louisiana – Mississippi Delta. Outfitter: Journey South Outfitters.

programme.title: Super Retriever
programme.desc: The Open Division kicks off at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship, in Shreveport Bossier CIty, Louisiana, featuring the sport’s most seasoned professional handlers and elite canine athletes. Competitors take on intense Retriever Trials and dynamic SRS Super Dock challenges, where experience and execution separate the best from the rest.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Over 70 years ago, John Olin took 600 acres of farmland joined by timber and turned it into a wildlife oasis in hopes of creating an ideal place to raise and train the best Labradors Retrievers in the country. He called it Nilo, which was also Olin’s model of conservation. Today, Nilo is still considered one of the most prestigious hunting and shooting preserves in the nation. This is the story of Nilo.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.sub-title: Winchester Life - “The Birth of a Legend”
programme.desc: The story of the game changing 350 Legend cartridge is documented at deer camps across the midwest with the Keefer Brothers in Kansas, Mark and Terry Drury in Missouri, Melissa Bachman in Nebraska and Team Winchester back in Missouri.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The collaboration story between Winchester and Browning to create the groundbreaking 6.8 Western is featured. Tag along on a mule deer hunt in Utah with Chris Keefer and Winchester’s Jason Gilbertson, then follow Casey Keefer to Colorado for elk and Nebraska for whitetail where the 6.8 Western is put to the test.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Deer season — the sights, the sounds and the smells stick with you. It’s about remembering those who came before us and setting the right example for those who look up to us. It’s about protecting the tradition, so they always have something to look forward to. When communities come together, we see the real reason for this special time of year.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Join Benny Spies of Team Winchester as he shares stories of his upbringing in South Dakota. From cherished family photos to duck seasons of the past, learn how a passion for hunting was ignited and became a way of life for Benny and his family.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The team at Winchester Ammunition has arrived in Oregon to visit the Leupold Long Range Academy. There, they’ll put Winchester’s new “Supreme Long Range” ammunition to the test, pushing its performance across demanding long-range scenarios. With precision, consistency, and confidence on the line, the team is eager to demonstrate exactly what “Precision Rifle Perfected” means when every shot counts.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.sub-title: S17:E03 - The Ballad of Midsomer County
programme.desc: Could a ballad made famous by late, lamented folk singer Johnny Carver be an inspiration for murder? Did someone want to kill Toby Winning for threatening to take the Little Crosby Folk Festival away from Midsomer - or is the true motive something hidden for 20 years?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The fizz goes out of a sparkling wine launch when the glasses are laced with slug poison. Who is targeting the Midsomer Vinae Winery and what does the attack have to do with the death of a child in a hit-and-run accident?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.sub-title: S14:E01 - Death in the Slow Lane
programme.desc: New DCI John Barnaby arrives in Midsomer and is bemused by the quaint villages and their quirky residents. But when a local DJ is crushed to death at a traditional girls' boarding school, he soon discovers that murder and deception are never far away. As the death toll rises, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The reclusive lives of elderly eccentrics William and Mary Bingham (Edward Fox and Phyllida Law) comes under police scrutiny when a social services investigator (Jeff Rawle) is murdered. Barnaby and Jones must unearth generations of family secrets and decipher astronomical charts to find the killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young woman is dressed like a bride and drowned in a bath, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders in Great Worthy. The case takes Barnaby and Jones to a donkey sanctuary, a heritage steam railway and a pub run by an ex-copper and former brothel madam. With the serial killer still at large, could history be repeating itself?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Jones goes undercover at the Oblong Foundation after one of the cult's young female members disappears suddenly. But he and Barnaby soon start digging into an old case involving the death of a couple in a boat explosion.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.sub-title: S14:E05 - The Sleep Under the Hill
programme.desc: In Midsomer Mow, the gruesome discovery of a farmer's eviscerated body in an ancient stone circle is made just days before the spring equinox.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.sub-title: S14:E06 - The Night of the Stag
programme.desc: A VAT inspector goes missing as he hunts for an illicit cider still responsible for brewing The Beast, a potent local hooch. At the Midsomer Abbas spring fayre which celebrates its friendship with Midsomer Herne, Barnaby and Jones sample the local cider, while temperance preacher Norman Grigor calls on residents to repent of their drunken ways. Suddenly, Barnaby is violently ill as the body of missing man Peter Slim is found floating in the cider vat. Meanwhile Samuel Quested (Warren Clarke), the traditionalist mayor of Midsomer Abbas, seeks to revive the ancient rite known as 'The Stag'.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the cloistered world of Midsomer Priory when a nun is strangled to death. The detectives uncover a complex mystery involving holy orders, teenage romantic liaisons, African art and missing antique silver as the community is forced to open its doors to 21st-century policing.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A row between keen birdwatchers in Midsomer-in-the-Marsh turns nasty when their president is killed. Patrick Morgan met his death while hoping to sight a rare bird, but is his obsession with ornithology to blame - or something more sinister?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When MATTHEW DRAPER, a quarry worker is killed by a demolition charge after obeying the orders of his foreman, IAN FRASER, to return to the unexploded device, no one can predict how it might effect the tranquil village of Fletcher's Cross nine years later...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's aunt, Alice Bly (Phyllis Calvert), has an addiction to detective stories, a deep admiration for her favourite nephew, and is recovering from an operation at the Lawnside Nursing Home. When a resident dies, Alice Bly picks up gossip which, mixed with the detective fiction with which she is passing the hours, makes her think that all is not as it should be at Lawnside.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The village of Midsomer Mallow is one of the villages hoping to win the title of the "Perfect English Village" competition. As the story unfolds, not everything is "perfect" as local thief Peter Drinkwater is stabbed with a pitchfork at an abandoned farm, he's using as a squat. Shortly after robbing a retired actor's home. Despite the villagers' best efforts to keep the murder quiet so as to not ruin their chances in the competition, several further deaths occur eventually bringing Detective Chief Inspector Barnaby back several decades to uncover the killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Whilst the Upper Marshwood hunt assemble outside the village inn, a filthy tramp-like man leaves the shop and skulks into the wood. Soon after, he hears the sound of the hunt begin and the unforgettable noise of the horses and hounds in hot pursuit of the fox. Running for cover, towards the safety of his home-made shelter, he stumbles and falls into a pit - screaming. LIZA, isolated in the disused railway carriage which constitutes her home, moves deeper into the wood having heard the scream. She finds the pit and sees the tramp lying crumpled on the ground, clearly dead. She stares at him for a moment, then turns and walks away.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused airfield near Morton Fendle is the location for a romantic evening between young Simon Bright and his girlfriend Laura Sharp - absolutely nothing could ruin their date. The next morning, when Frances Kirby is out for her morning jog, she notices the vintage car they were in up at the airfield, containing Simon Bright's dead body, with Laura nowhere to be seen. Confused, Detective Chief Inspector Barnaby and D.S. Jones can't work out whether it was a suicide pact or murder. Furthermore, they've got to find Miss Sharp and their investigation leads them to linking Simon and Laura with the villagers of Morton Fendle, who met at Elaine Trim's dancing classes. Eventually, the Barnaby family plus Jones make it to a 40s style dance night at the village hall before more villagers start turning up dead.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Faith Alexander arrives in Midsomer County to meet her long-lost uncle Rex Masters, she gets a shock - Rex's staff had been told that she was dead. Things become even more complex when Rex's body is found in a nearby river, bearing wounds that suggest he was murdered. Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case, trying to establish who would have wanted the elderly man dead. Several people soon come forward with multiple wills, which confuse the matter, but when two more people, close friends of Rex, are also murdered, the investigation raises question on the motive, leading Barnaby to wonder if it was down to finances, passion, or something from Rex's past.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Following the death of Alan King while on a business trip to China, the family company, King's Crystal, is in financial trouble. As plans to shut the Midsomer Magna factory are being put into action, Alan's wife Hilary and brother Charles are married in the village church - much to the dismay of Alan's son Ian. In addition to strife between members of the family, the factory workers are outraged at the loss of their jobs. So when company accountant Peter Baxter is found murdered, Barnaby and Jones suspect a disgruntled employee is to blame. But in order to investigate the matter further, Jones is forced to work undercover, and infiltrate the local group of Freemasons in the village.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The music lovers of Midsomer County are delighted when a host of bands arrives for the Midsomer Rocks festival. Barnaby himself is particularly looking forward to seeing recently re-formed rock band, Hired Gun, perform on stage, but he soon gets close to the band for rather unfortunate reasons. During their opening performance, the band's singer, Mimi (Suzi Quatro), falls to the ground dead - electrocuted by a wire that had been run through the microphone stand. Barnaby and Jones soon find the rest of the band could be targets, and when another is killed, questions are raised as to whether former band member, Ginger Foxton, who went missing for 30 years and is presumed dead, is still at large. The detectives soon have to delve into a world of rock music, drug use and greed, to find the truth.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Sammy Davis Jr., Shelley Winters, Michelle Pfeiffer, Burt Reynolds (8/1/80)
programme.desc: Sammy Davis, Jr. is a fan of soap operas and Burt Reynolds surprises him. Shelley Winters talks about her book. Michelle Pfeiffer used to box groceries at a supermarket.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Joan Rivers, Jack Lemmon (1/3/73)
programme.desc: Johnny and Joan Rivers admit to stealing hotel soap; Jack Lemmon appears with the legendary director Billy Wilder

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - David Letterman, Susan Sarandon (1/2/81)
programme.desc: David Letterman brings Johnny some party supplies to help ring in the new year; Susan Sarandon shares a story of being in a sensory deprivation tank.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Charles Grodin, The Amazing Randi (3/22/73)
programme.desc: The Amazing Randi does a stunt involving a ladder. Charles Grodin details a recent harrowing plane flight.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Carl Reiner (8/5/85)
programme.desc: Carl Reiner ate his way through France, complains to Johnny about weight gain. A clip from Summer Rentals.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Sylvester Stallone (5/21/85)
programme.desc: Rocky said “Life is about…how many you can take.” Sly Stallone talks early struggles and his flagging career.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Joan Rivers (5/14/81)
programme.desc: The birds and the bees are a topic of conversation for Joan Rivers.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Carl Reiner (1/4/83)
programme.desc: Carl improvises Italian aria and riffs on tabloid celebrity stories. Greg Louganis shows off on a trampoline.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '50s - Jack Palance (5/10/91)
programme.desc: The ultimate Hollywood bad guy, Jack Palance chats with Johnny about his break-out role in Shane (1949).

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Dave Thomas (6/1/90)
programme.desc: Witness Dave Thomas' Bob Hope and Andrew Dice Clay impressions. Plus: Buddy Hackett tells jokes.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Garry Shandling talks about laundromats and Disneyland.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Patrick Swayze (10/13/87)
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze discusses Dirty Dancing, plus Johnny interviews A. Whitney Brown and Alexandra Paul.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Barbara Walters describes dealing with touchy heads of state and getting Christmas cards from world leaders.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Sally Field (2/20/79)
programme.desc: Sally Field details her relationship with Burt Reynolds. Plus, Buddy Hackett appears.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Carlin talks about going on vacation after months on the road, and Johnny chats with Gene Hackman.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Ann-Margret, Bruce Dern, Art Carney (1/22/75)
programme.desc: Ann-Margret gives Johnny a Swedish lesson then performs a musical number, Bruce Dern shares when he had his first kiss, and Art Carney shows up in his pajamas.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Dick Cavett chats about his commencement speech at Yale (a lot of potty jokes and one-liners, apparently)

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Craig T. Nelson (4/2/92)
programme.desc: Actor Craig T. Nelson recalls his first (disastrous) appearance on The Tonight Show.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Gary Busey (8/23/85)
programme.desc: Gary Busey talks about his early rocker days playing in a band at Disneyland and Knott’s Berry Farm.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Louie Anderson (11/20/84)
programme.desc: For his first appearance on “The Tonight Show” Louie Anderson pays tribute to his parents and his home state.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Celebrated news anchor Walter Cronkite thinks people should get their news from books and newspapers, and TV.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Mel Brooks (2/13/75)
programme.desc: Mel Brooks talks about Young Frankenstein and Blazing Saddles. Plus, Susan Blakely and Bob Rosefsky appear.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Johnny jokes about Gerald Ford and political slogans and sits down with Phyllis George.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Tennis great Bjorn Borg rolls a clip from his 5th Wimbledon victory and chats about going pro at 15.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Martin Mull, Betty White, Barry Bremen (2/9/79)
programme.desc: Johnny talks about a trip to the butcher and is joined by athlete impostor Barry Bremen. Martin Mull sings and plays guitar, Betty White is intimidated by writers.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Steven Wright (12/12/84)
programme.desc: Steven Wright talks about everything from his girlfriend to filming a small part in his first movie.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Charles Grodin (9/5/90)
programme.desc: Johnny isn't interested in what Charles Grodin has to say. B.B. King and Amy Yasbeck also grace the couch.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Comic Legends Of The '50s - Jackie Gleason (10/18/85)
programme.desc: Jackie Gleason opens up about why he quit The Honeymooners after only three years. Plus, Jim Stafford appears.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Jane Goodall describes how primates mirror humans in that they can make and use tools.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Oprah Winfrey opens up about growing up poor and feeling blessed about her surging income.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.desc: Animal trainer Jim Fowler brings a baby baboon and golden eagle onto the set. Plus, Gore Vidal is a guest.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show
programme.sub-title: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s - Miss Piggy (7/12/84)
programme.desc: The epitome of beauty and elegance, Miss Piggy extols the joys of learning French.

programme.title: My Perfect Day
programme.sub-title: My Perfect Day with Women's Day: Nurturing Nurse Steps Up To The Front Line For A Day Full Of Surprises
programme.desc: Dedicated mom and nurse, Cleo, spends a day filled with surprises. This incredible mother has overcome obstacles no parent should have to face. Cleo and her sons cook up some quality time.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Sports create pockets of communities all across our country. For people of all ages who love the game, it's more than just exercise: it can give hope, support, inspiration and a future.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.sub-title: Plate It Pittsburgh!: Thrill of the Grill
programme.desc: In this battle of the grill, Chef Todd Cassell and Chef Alekka Sweeney face-off to see who can bring home the bragging rights with their Pittsburgh inspired dishes.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.sub-title: Finding Adventure: Double Amputee’s Inspiring Ride
programme.desc: Three years after his double amputation, Jeff in Albuquerque is ready to reconnect with nature. Kinga is there to root him on as he takes on challenging and inspiring outdoor adventures.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot

programme.desc: Embarrassed by his mixed-up magical spells, a dejected Orko strays from the Royal Palace. Meanwhile, Skeletor orders Evil-Lyn to steal a powerful artifact known only as the Ram Stone.

programme.title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe
programme.sub-title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe - Siren's Song
programme.desc: After suffering yet another defeat at the hands of the Masters, the Evil Warriors retreat back to Snake Mountain where Evil-Lyn suggests turning the heroes against one another.

programme.title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe
programme.sub-title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe - The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: Injured during a battle with the Evil Warriors, an unconscious Teela is taken to Castle Grayskull by Man-At-Arms and receives a blood transfusion from the Sorceress.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Alister dispatches his airborne arsenal Air Fortress Ziggurat! How can Kaiba defeat a monster the size of the plane itself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz has taken over KaibaCorp! Can Kaiba, with Yugi's help, break into his own company which he's protected with the latest in security technology?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Fighting for a Friend, Part 1
programme.desc: With chaos running rampant, Valon separates Joey from his friends for a final showdown with Mai's heart on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: When Yuma's Heart Pieces are swiped by a pack of stray dogs, Cathy calls on her feline friends to help hunt them down!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After using his powers to escape from Heartland City, Hart unleashes a path of destruction that only Yuma can help stop!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: As Kite desperately searches for his brother Hart, Vetrix puts his diabolical plan for revenge in motion!

programme.title: Angry Birds - Chucked Out, Bomb's Awake & More
programme.desc: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Chucked Out", "Bomb's Awake" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds - Hide and Seek & More
programme.desc: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Hide and Seek", "Sink or Swim" and more!

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.sub-title: Super Mario Bros 3 - Crimes R Us / Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa busts out a top criminal so he can teach the Koopalings to steal and to stop the Mario Brothers. / Hip and Hop Koopa turn Luigi and King Whim-bag, of the ice world, into dogs with the king's wand.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.sub-title: Super Mario Bros 3 - Up, up and a Koopa
programme.desc: Kooky uses his new "Raiser Upper" machine to levitate everything in the Mushroom Kingdom to the sky. / Another set of adventures starring the now-classic kids' heroes, The Super Marios Bros. This time Koopa has escaped from a Banishment Zone to battle the Super Mario Bros. And he has a powerful new weapon, the Koopa Kids - Koopa's bratty, yet lovable.

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: Drawing a line on a museum floor, the Rabbids encounter a perfectly straight line that blocks their way. The line marks a space in front of a minimalist painting...

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: The boutique on the pier offers a promotion on pocket fans. The Rabbids waste no time in putting them on buoys to make hovercrafts.

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: An old lady distracts a Rabbid, and he accidentally shuts himself inside a supermarket freezer. The Rabbids discover the "powers" of frozen things: they stick, they make you shiver, and they slide!

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: A DJ is preparing his mix for the party that night. The Rabbids discover his vinyl records, and use them as frisbees. The DJ watches as all of his hard work goes down the drain. But then, the Rabbids discover the turntable...

programme.title: Rabbids
programme.desc: After a night of partying, a group of Rabbids try to sleep in a corner of a supermarket.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.sub-title: Bakugan Geogan Rising - Lia and Fenneca
programme.desc: Lia and her new Bakugan Fenneca find themselves in a bit of trouble.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.sub-title: Bakugan Geogan Rising - A Former Thief and a Laid Back Dude
programme.desc: Ajit, Lia and Lighting have a run in with Strata, the Bakugan hunter.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.sub-title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - The Wizard of Odd
programme.desc: Pac and Fuzbitz go through a space worm to an odd world where doppelgangers of everyone they know are characters from familiar, but slightly off stories.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.sub-title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Indiana Pac and the Dentures of Doom
programme.desc: The diabolical dentures of an evil Mummy wizard could cause the destruction of PacWorld if they are reunited with their malicious master.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.sub-title: Skylanders Academy - A Traitor Among Us
programme.desc: Eruptor is convinced that Kaossandra is Strykore's evil spy and must be stopped.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: When Eon enlists the help of the famous Captain Flynn to assist the team in bringing Kaos to justice, the Skylanders discover the legendary stories about him may just be tall tales.

programme.title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe
programme.sub-title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe - Dragon's Brood
programme.desc: Racing their Sky Sleds through the Evergreen Forest, Prince Adam and Teela stumble upon and rescue a large dragon trapped in a cavern by a rockslide.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Reyhan y Mahinur van a la granja para hablar con Fatma. Metin defiende a Öykü y golpea a Siman. Orhan se enoja al saber que Meyati pagó dos millones más por la granja de Fatma.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Orhan le avisa a Cüneyt que acepta formar parte de la cooperativa. Selim acude a la inauguración de la fundación y sorprende a Busra. Orhan se entera de que el cantante no llegará a tiempo así que Kadir toma su lugar.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Sinan busca a Öyku y al ver que está con Metin, se presenta como su novio. Orhan y Busra se besan y Selim los ve. Öyku va a casa de Metin para disculparse, pero Mahinur es dura con ella y le pide alejarse.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Alguien arroja una piedra con un mensaje amenazante a la ventana de la casa de Yesim. Mahinur amenaza a Öykü. Selim intenta decirle la verdad a la madre de Busra. Besime alucinando con Sermin.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Metin encuentra una nota de Öykü en el invernadero. Los niños del colegio piden autógrafos a Kadir después de la fiesta. Öykü está triste porque se imagina que Metin no la ha perdonado.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Para protegerlo, Jade toma aire y fuerzas para decirle a Lucas que no lo ama y lo echa de la casa. Ella se siente destruida y, con más fastidio hacia Said, aplica el plan de aburrirlo.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Jade no se rinde y le quema la ropa a Said, pero él ya se dio cuenta de sus intenciones de desesperarlo y le grita que jamás le va a dar el divorcio. Ella le suplica, pero no consigue nada.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Con dolor y resignación, Lucas acepta su destino con Marisa y el bebé que van a tener. Jade se entera de que Lucas va a ser padre y rompe en llanto. Cristina averigua por el papá del niño de Dora.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Jade quiere otra esposa para Said y habla con Muna, una mujer bella y soltera, le dice que Said busca otra mujer. Cristina invita a Leonardo a la fiesta de Daniel, Albieri está nervioso.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: En cuanto ve a su hija, Lucas se conmueve y olvida todas sus discusiones con Marisa. Albieri inventa otra mentira, dice que el embrión fue implantado en otro vientre, no en el de Dora.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex Debogorski is moving a construction shack that might be too heavy for the ice, so the veteran trucker uses a steel sled to drag the huge haul across a frozen lake.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the early 90s, a gang based in the U.S. Virgin Islands began smuggling thousands of kilos of cocaine into mainland America. Police and federal agents target the gang, but its leader remains a mystery. In an investigation spanning from Georgia to South America, local police, the DEA, U.S. Customs and the FBI work together to take down this dangerous drug gang.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In June 1973, a young girl was abducted from a state park on the Missouri River while camping with her family. Several months passed with no leads, then an FBI agent took a particular interest in the case. Using a new technique known as criminal profiling, he predicted that the kidnapper would contact the girl's family on the one-year anniversary of her abduction. When this prediction came true, the FBI agent noted behavioral clues, hoping that they could lead him to the kidnapper.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1986, a small crime free Indiana town was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. After an officer was gunned down at point-blank range, the psychotic killer led investigators across the Midwest. No one knew where the gunman would strike next, even as his tally of murders and abductions grew. The FBI and state police raced against time to rescue America's heartland from this deranged gunman, before he killed again.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Georgia, a series of bizarre shootings terrorizes the town of East Point. Two people are killed, and two are critically wounded. At first the shootings seem targeted, then they seem random. As the body count climbs, the killer taunts law enforcement with mysterious notes. Agents believe the shooter will continue until he is deador behind bars.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a ruthless grab for power leads to a full-scale mob war. The local Mafia crime family splits in two as the young and the old fight to the death. The FBI is caught in the middle as they infiltrate the syndicate through informants and high-tech surveillance. Agents must find a way to bring down the organization before their civil war leads to innocent causalities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1990 and 1991, Chicago police and the FBI were on the trail of a bank robber whose holdups were becoming increasingly violent. The criminal consistently used stolen Japanese cars to carry out the robberies, so authorities hoped to identify him by tracking vehicle thefts. When they finally located the man known as the bearded bandit, they learned that he did not work alone and he had made a pact never to surrender.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In New York, the FBI and local police join forces to battle the constant influx of Colombian cocaine into the city's ports. One detective goes undercover, posing as a Mafia wise-guy, and infiltrates a drug gang connected to Pablo Escobar's Medellin cartel. The detective must be bold, but cautious, taking on the role of a tough-guy, but always aware that if the gang suspects anything, they won't hesitate to kill him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, the FBI matches wits with a cunning bank robber -- a lone gunman responsible for the longest string of unsolved bank robberies in FBI history. The robber's planning is meticulous. He executes his crimes with military precision. It will take the combined skills of local police and dozens of agents to catch a criminal mastermind they call, "The Shootist."

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1991, the Safe Streets Task Force, a joint FBI / Washington D.C. Metropolitan Police Department organization, begins conducting an investigation into the violent activities of a local gang called the K Street Crew. Gang members are suspected of involvement in several area homicides. The FBI approaches several witnesses, hoping to convince them to testify against the gang members. Seven potential witnesses are murdered during the course of the investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In August 1992, a man returned to his Memphis home and discovered that his wife was missing. The husband, as well as his friends, family and neighbors began to receive ransom calls. FBI agents noticed that one neighbor seemed to have the best rapport with the kidnapper. They began to question his level of involvement, but had to proceed carefully, knowing that he could be their only link to the missing woman.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, a pair of convicted felons escaped the custody of a local deputy and fled across the country. Eluding authorities, they moved from state to state in a wave of abduction and car theft. When a foreign military officer disappeared along their trail, police and FBI agents wondered if the armed fugitives had become killers. Agents believed the pair were growing more violent and raced to find the escapees before more victims crossed their path.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the mid-1990's, a gang of professional bank robbers raided cities across seven states. Disguises and speed protected their identity from cameras and the police as they stole hundreds of thousands of dollars, always leaving a bomb to terrorize their victims. The stakes were raised when the FBI discovered the robbers had an agenda beyond their personal wealth. To stop these extremists and their growing operation, the FBI needed to capture their leaders.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Police investigate two brutal murders in two small towns located hundreds of miles apart. The crimes seem random and unrelated, until investigators discover a terrifying link. Local police and the FBI must untangle a web of liesto stop a dangerous gang that will kill a man for his Identity.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: This documentary series takes viewers behind the scenes of major crime investigations, as agents and scientists recount their forensic detective work.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An elderly woman is driving when she's overcome with shooting pains and crashes her car. She's rushed to the hospital, but the doctors find nothing wrong. Can Dr. G find the cause of death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It's a late night and a Vietnam veteran with a history of mental illness is drunk and stumbling through an apartment complex. When the police arrive, he pulls a gun and shoots himself in the head.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G preforms an autopsy on an alleged hit-and-run victim but finds no evidence of vehicular injury on the 41-year-old man's body. Could his alcoholism have had a role in his death?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a motel room due to multiple shotgun wounds. Dr. G proves the scene isn't what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An 82-year-old woman appears to have committed suicide by overdosing on painkillers, but Dr. G finds evidence that suggests that she may have died of a heart attack.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Rusty Updike has asked his ex-wife Vesta on a cruise. The couple haven't seen each other for 15 years but Vesta decides that a cruise with her ex might make for a nice change of pace.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.sub-title: S01:E03 - The Mystery of the Haunted Crossing
programme.desc: In August of 1995, when Dr. G worked in Texas, a pile of human bones was found at a supposedly haunted railroad crossing. Dr. G was able to determine the age but not the sex.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Both natural disease and sport's injury are likely suspects in Eric Brody's death. But then Dr. G learns that he was treated with antibiotics for a spider bite prior to his death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Melissa Riobe's life is ruled by her addiction to drugs. Now, the 42-year-old woman has learned how to buy powerful prescription drugs online without a doctor's note.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Manny Alvarez mysteriously crashes his car into a fence. He dies en route to the hospital, leaving behind a wife and son. It is up to Dr. G to find out what cut this young man's life short.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When the husband, Tao Chen, is shot to death by his wife Jun, she claims she pulled the trigger in self-defense when a drunken Tao came after her with a gun.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Carol Moleskie agrees to go on a hunting excursion with her husband, Bob. A few hours after they enter the woods, they emerge again, Bob frantically waving down traffic as he carries his bloody wife.

programme.title: Wolf Creek

programme.title: Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Haunted by the violent deaths of her parents and brother, Eve sets out alone to cross the most remote country on earth on her quest for revenge.

programme.title: Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Realizing Eve is hunting him, Mick Taylor puts into play a murderous game of cat and mouse. When push comes to shove Eve isn't sure she can kill him in cold blood.

programme.title: Wolf Creek
programme.desc: As Mick’s murder spree continues Eve investigates the cold case disappearance of a young girl, only to be captured by her predator … and barely makes it out alive.

programme.title: Wolf Creek

programme.title: Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Lured to Wolf Creek Crater, Eve comes face to face with her quarry - will she be the victor or the vanquished?

programme.title: Wolf Creek
